site.title: Macro Daily
site.subtitle: Daily macro briefing generated from the local macro research framework

latest.headline: Macro input scan captured 65 candidate items across 12 working sources.
latest.summary: Only macro-relevant items are retained. Primary sources lead the stack, while media and fast-wire items stay in the alert layer.
latest.monitoring_strategy: Only macro-relevant releases, policy signals, and cross-asset risk items should enter the daily brief. Official data and policy pages outrank media summaries.
monitoring_notes: Keep this project focused on macro only: policy, liquidity, rates, inflation, labor, growth, trade, FX, energy, and cross-asset risk.
Exclude company news, sector-only stories, stock-specific headlines, and non-macro market color unless they clearly change the macro transmission path.
Use media and fast-wire sources for alerting only, then verify important items against primary sources.

monitoring_sources.name: 国务院 / 中国政府网要闻
monitoring_sources.notes: Top-level China policy source. Use it to confirm State Council meetings, policy documents, and official briefing language.

monitoring_sources.name: 中国人民银行
monitoring_sources.notes: Primary China monetary-policy and liquidity source. Relevant for OMO, LPR, FX, financial stability, and official statistical releases.

monitoring_sources.name: 国家统计局英文发布
monitoring_sources.notes: Primary source for China macro data releases and statistical commentary.

monitoring_sources.name: 国家外汇管理局英文发布
monitoring_sources.notes: FX reserves, balance-of-payments and cross-border flow monitoring.

monitoring_sources.name: 国家发展改革委新闻动态
monitoring_sources.notes: Useful for growth policy, pricing policy, energy policy, infrastructure, and domestic-demand signals.

monitoring_sources.name: Federal Reserve Press Releases
monitoring_sources.notes: Primary source for Fed policy, facilities, supervision, and liquidity announcements.

monitoring_sources.name: Federal Reserve Speeches
monitoring_sources.notes: Good for Fed communication drift and policy tone before formal meeting outcomes change.

monitoring_sources.name: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics Newsroom
monitoring_sources.notes: Primary U.S. labor and inflation release source.

monitoring_sources.name: U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis Current Releases
monitoring_sources.notes: Primary U.S. GDP, PCE, income, trade, and sector-activity release source.

monitoring_sources.name: IMF News and Press Releases
monitoring_sources.notes: Helpful for global macro backdrop, spillovers, and multilateral policy framing.

monitoring_sources.name: 财联社电报
monitoring_sources.notes: Highest-frequency China-friendly macro alert stream. Every important item still needs primary-source confirmation.

monitoring_sources.name: 财联社深度
monitoring_sources.notes: Macro-oriented depth and interpretation layer from 财联社 homepage. Use it as a context supplement, not as the final authority.

monitoring_sources.name: Reuters Markets
monitoring_sources.notes: Disabled for now because direct site fetching is not stable in the current environment.

sections.title: Media alerts worth verifying
sections.hint: These are fast macro signals and framing aids. Confirm anything important against primary sources before treating it as final.

items.title: 美国消费者信心跌至三个月低点 最富裕阶层也因股市重挫遭受打击
items.meta: 财联社深度 | P1 | secondary | 2026-03-28 00:55:35
items.summary: ①3月份美国消费者信心降至53.3，为去年12月以来最低水平，主要受中东战争引发的通胀忧虑和经济前景不确定性影响； ②若美伊战争持续数月，经济前景可能迅速恶化，引发下行螺旋：股市下跌导致支出减弱，最终陷入衰退。

items.title: 航空燃油价格短短一个月翻倍 一场全球“飞行危机”正在显现
items.meta: 财联社深度 | P1 | secondary | 2026-03-28 03:25:58
items.summary: ①中东战事持续冲击全球能源供应链，航空煤油价格自开战以来已从约800美元/吨飙升至1600美元/吨，亚洲多国航空公司开始停飞或削减航班； ②分析指出，欧洲最快5月或出现燃油短缺； ③对于乘客来说，过去一个月也经历了燃油附加费的飞涨。

items.title: 美国总统特使预计本周将与伊朗举行会谈；央行召开2026年金融稳定工作会议
items.meta: 财联社深度 | P1 | secondary | 2026-03-28 07:00:00
items.summary: ①中方对美方启动两项贸易壁垒调查②央行召开2026年金融稳定工作会议③两部门：根据空间业务实际占用带宽向卫星运营商收取无线电频率占用费④美国总统特使预计本周将与伊朗举行会谈⑤工商银行、建设银行等披露2025年年报。

items.title: 欧盟官员警告欧盟经济正面临滞胀风险
items.meta: 财联社电报 | P1 | secondary | 2026-03-28 11:07:11
items.summary: 【欧盟官员警告欧盟经济正面临滞胀风险】财联社3月28日电，欧盟委员会负责经济事务的委员瓦尔季斯·东布罗夫斯基斯27日表示，由于中东战事引发能源价格飙升，欧盟经济正面临滞胀风险。当天，欧元集团就能源价格问题举行线上会议。东布罗夫斯基斯在会后召开的新闻发布会上表示，“前景被高度的不确定性笼罩”，欧盟经济正面临滞胀风险，即经济增长放缓与通胀上升并存的局面。“即便能源供应受阻时间相对短暂，也会出现这种情况。”分析表明，2026年欧盟经济增...

items.title: “末日博士”鲁比尼：特朗普更有可能升级伊朗局势而非选择退让
items.meta: 财联社深度 | P1 | secondary | 2026-03-27 23:25:36
items.summary: ①著名经济学家鲁比尼预测，美国总统特朗普可能选择升级对伊朗的冲突以争取胜利，而非退让。他认为冲突升级的概率超过50%； ②鲁比尼警告称，冲突持续将对全球经济造成冲击，可能导致油价上涨、各国下调经济增长预期，并可能迫使美联储和欧洲央行加息。

items.title: 巴防务分析专家：巴基斯坦正在美伊间发挥协调与斡旋作用
items.meta: 财联社电报 | P1 | secondary | 2026-03-28 11:18:35
items.summary: 【巴防务分析专家：巴基斯坦正在美伊间发挥协调与斡旋作用】财联社3月28日电，巴基斯坦外交部长达尔26日证实，美伊间接谈判正通过由巴基斯坦传递信息的方式进行。对此，巴基斯坦防务分析专家贾维德·伊克巴尔在接受总台记者采访时表示，当前局势复杂，巴基斯坦正在美伊两国间发挥协调与斡旋作用。防务分析专家贾维德·伊克巴尔：这一角色源于我们关键的地理位置和我们的外交政策，以及我们与该地区和这场冲突中，除以色列以外的所有重要利益攸关方的良好关系。在...

items.title: 美国总统特使预计本周将与伊朗举行会谈；央行召开2026年金融稳定工作会议
items.meta: 财联社深度 | P1 | secondary | 2026-03-28 07:00:00
items.summary: ①中方对美方启动两项贸易壁垒调查②央行召开2026年金融稳定工作会议③两部门：根据空间业务实际占用带宽向卫星运营商收取无线电频率占用费④美国总统特使预计本周将与伊朗举行会谈⑤工商银行、建设银行等披露2025年年报。

items.title: 航空燃油价格短短一个月翻倍 一场全球“飞行危机”正在显现
items.meta: 财联社深度 | P1 | secondary | 2026-03-28 03:25:58
items.summary: ①中东战事持续冲击全球能源供应链，航空煤油价格自开战以来已从约800美元/吨飙升至1600美元/吨，亚洲多国航空公司开始停飞或削减航班； ②分析指出，欧洲最快5月或出现燃油短缺； ③对于乘客来说，过去一个月也经历了燃油附加费的飞涨。

items.title: “末日博士”鲁比尼：特朗普更有可能升级伊朗局势而非选择退让
items.meta: 财联社深度 | P1 | secondary | 2026-03-27 23:25:36
items.summary: ①著名经济学家鲁比尼预测，美国总统特朗普可能选择升级对伊朗的冲突以争取胜利，而非退让。他认为冲突升级的概率超过50%； ②鲁比尼警告称，冲突持续将对全球经济造成冲击，可能导致油价上涨、各国下调经济增长预期，并可能迫使美联储和欧洲央行加息。

sections.title: Framework line
items: Start from the core contradiction instead of starting from the latest price move.
Treat macro research as a transmission grammar that can later plug into industry work.
Separate leading variables from confirmation variables before assigning market weight.

sections.title: Transmission map
items: Base path: policy -> rates -> credit -> FX/liquidity -> risk appetite -> asset pricing.
Fast paths can begin from flows, positioning, or geopolitics, but they still need to reconnect to the same macro chain.
Do not confuse the end-point asset move with the true starting variable.

sections.title: First 30-minute checklist
items: Confirm listing status and market context.
Identify the industry archetype.
Pull the last 2-3 strongest reports, not the full archive.
Write the core contradiction in one sentence.
List the top 5 tracking indicators.
List the top 3 disconfirmation risks.

sections.title: Core research questions
items: Question 1: What is the current core contradiction in this industry framework set?
Question 2: Which variables explain revenue and margin changes first?
Question 3: Which leading indicators move before earnings revisions?
Question 4: Which sub-segments or company types map to different KPI sets?
Question 5: Which policy or macro variables can invalidate the base case?
Question 6: Which valuation anchors are actually used in the report set?

sections.title: Risk and falsification
items: Do not reverse-engineer a macro story from a price move that has already happened.
A single data point is not a macro cycle turn unless it persists and enters the transmission chain.
Write the failure condition explicitly: which leading variable would invalidate the current line first?
Distinguish timing lag from thesis failure before downgrading a framework.

sections.title: Macro-to-industry interfaces
items: Technology usually receives macro through liquidity, valuation, and risk appetite rather than through the first data print.
Financials receive macro directly through rates, credit, regulation, and balance-sheet quality.
Resources and materials receive macro through global demand, the dollar, inventory, and price transmission.
Consumer and autos often receive macro through income expectations, confidence, policy stimulus, and financing access.
